campaign: SIMD string scans (NO-GAPS) — routing profile + first contained lever
scenario: NEW perf_profile str_contains: 1M rows x ~24-char Utf8, ~10% needle hit rate, 10 iters

vs_pandas.note: NO vs-pandas gap existed even before the lever (FP 1.11x ahead); after it FP is ~3.4x ahead. pandas object-dtype str ops are Python-loop bound.

lever: apply_str_bool typed fast path for bool-returning string predicates (contains/startswith/endswith): all-valid Utf8 input emits Column::from_bool_values (skips per-row Scalar::Bool boxing + from_values re-validation) and reuses the source Index via its Arc-backed cache-preserving clone (skips the full Vec<IndexLabel> deep copy apply_str pays per call)

isomorphism.values: same boolean at every slot (func unchanged); mixed/nullable inputs fall through to apply_str unchanged (missing -> Null(NaN))
isomorphism.index: source index clone preserves labels+name; keeping label_identity only makes the equality cache hit MORE often with identical answers
isomorphism.system_time: process System 440ms -> 82ms (the 32MB Scalar output + 32MB label copy per iter were the page-fault wall)

profile_evidence: perf record pre-lever: StringAccessor::contains 24% self+children with the Vec<Scalar> collect at 13.9%; heavy kernel page-fault frames from the per-iter 64MB of avoidable allocation
